label: Iran confirms death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei following strike in Tehran
label_zh: 伊朗證實最高領袖哈梅內伊在德黑蘭遇襲後死亡

timeline.title: Israel Targets Late Supreme Leader’s Inner Circle in Fresh Tehran Decapitation Strikes
timeline.title_zh: 以色列在德黑蘭針對最高領導人核心圈發動新一輪斬首行動
timeline.sub_title: Following the confirmed death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Israeli forces claim the elimination of security chief Ali Larijani and the Basij commander amid ongoing air strikes across the capital.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 在最高領導人阿亞圖拉·阿里·哈梅內伊證實死亡後，以色列方面聲稱在首都持續的空襲中消滅了安全主管阿里·拉里亞尼和巴斯基部隊指揮官。
timeline.summary:
The campaign to dismantle the Iranian leadership intensified significantly on Tuesday as Israel announced the elimination of two more senior figures in the wake of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei’s death. According to the Israeli Ministry of Defense, overnight airstrikes in Tehran successfully targeted Ali Larijani, the Secretary of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council, and General Gholamreza Soleimani, the head of the Basij paramilitary force. These [ref:2] latest decapitation strikes are part of a coordinated effort by the United States and Israel to systematically remove the individuals currently managing Iran’s wartime response following the assassination of the Supreme Leader in late February.

Ali Larijani had emerged as a central figure in the weeks following the February 28 strike that killed Ayatollah Khamenei, reportedly acting as a de-facto coordinator for the regime's security policies. His death, if confirmed by Tehran, would represent the most significant loss to the Iranian political establishment since the start of the current conflict. Simultaneously [ref:1], the targeting of General Soleimani and his deputy within a recently established Basij command center aims to paralyze the regime’s internal security apparatus. The Basij has historically been the primary force used to quell domestic dissent, which has reportedly flared in areas like Tehran’s Chitgar district as news of the recent strikes spread.

Infrastructure targets also remain a priority for the joint coalition. The Israel Defense Forces confirmed that on March 16, they successfully dismantled a key government aircraft at Tehran’s Mehrabad Airport. This plane was frequently [ref:5] utilized by the late Supreme Leader and other top-tier officials for both domestic coordination and international military procurement. By grounding such [ref:5] assets, the coalition seeks to isolate the remaining Iranian leadership and prevent any remaining members of the government from maintaining a mobile command post or coordinating with regional allies.

Amidst these strikes, a profound leadership vacuum persists at the highest levels of the Iranian state. While Mojtaba Khamenei was officially appointed to succeed his father on March 8, his continued absence from the public eye has fueled intense speculation regarding his health. U.S. officials have noted that the new Supreme Leader has not delivered a single televised address since his appointment, with statements instead being read by presenters on state television. Some intelligence reports suggest he may have been severely injured in the initial wave of attacks, leaving the country without a visible or vocal head of state during its greatest crisis in decades.

The humanitarian and regional situation continues to deteriorate as the war enters its third week. Iranian officials recently reported a devastating missile strike on a school in the country’s south that allegedly killed over 160 children, adding to a death toll that now exceeds 1,300 according to the Iranian Red Crescent. Meanwhile, regional allies such as Hezbollah in Lebanon and various militias in Iraq have been drawn deeper into the conflict, launching retaliatory strikes that have expanded the theater of operations. Despite the escalating violence, U.S. President Donald Trump stated on Tuesday that the military success has been so substantial that the United States no longer requires the assistance of NATO allies to complete its objectives. As Tehran remains under [ref:4] a near-total internet blackout, the 40-day mourning period for the late Ali Khamenei has transformed into a period of total defensive struggle for the survival of the Islamic Republic.
timeline.summary_zh:
隨著最高領導人阿里·哈梅內伊的死亡，旨在瓦解伊朗領導層的行動於週二顯著升級，以色列宣布在最高領導人於2月底被暗殺後，又消滅了兩名高級官員。據以色列國防部稱，週二晚間對德黑蘭發動的空襲成功鎖定了伊朗最高國家安全委員會秘書阿里·拉里亞尼和巴斯基準軍事部隊領導人戈拉姆雷薩·蘇萊馬尼將軍。這些最新的斬首行動是美國和以色列為系統性清除在最高領導人於2月下旬被暗殺後，目前管理伊朗戰時應對措施的個人所進行的協調行動。

阿里·拉里亞尼在最高領導人哈梅內伊於2月28日遇刺身亡後數週，已成為伊朗政權的核心人物，據報他負責協調該政權的安全政策。他的死亡，如果得到德黑蘭方面的證實，將代表自當前衝突開始以來伊朗政治體系遭受的最重大損失。同時，針對蘇萊馬尼將軍及其副手在一個新設立的巴斯基指揮中心進行的襲擊，旨在癱瘓該政權的內部安全機構。巴斯基部隊歷來是鎮壓國內異議的主要力量，據報導，隨著近期襲擊的消息傳播，德黑蘭的奇特加爾區等地的異議聲音已有所抬頭。

基礎設施目標仍然是聯合聯合軍的優先目標。以色列國防軍證實，3月16日，他們成功摧毀了德黑蘭邁赫拉巴德機場的一架關鍵政府飛機。這架飛機經常被已故最高領導人和其他高級官員用於國內協調和國際軍事採購。通過使這類資產停飛，聯軍尋求孤立伊朗現存領導層，並阻止任何現任政府成員維持機動指揮所或與地區盟友協調。

在這些襲擊中，最高層的領導真空依然存在。雖然穆傑塔巴·哈梅內伊於3月8日被正式任命為他父親的繼任者，但他持續缺席公眾視野，加劇了人們對他健康狀況的強烈猜測。美國官員指出，這位新任最高領導人自上任以來沒有發表過一次電視演講，聲明均由國家電視台的播音員代讀。一些情報報告稱，他可能在最初的襲擊浪潮中受重傷，導致國家在面臨數十年來最嚴峻的危機時，沒有公開或聲音響亮的國家元首。

隨著戰爭進入第三週，人道主義和地區局勢持續惡化。伊朗官員最近報告稱，該國南部一所學校遭到毀滅性導彈襲擊，據稱造成160多名兒童死亡，根據伊朗紅十字會的統計，死亡人數已超過1300人。與此同時，黎巴嫩真主黨和伊拉克各民兵組織等地區盟友也更深地捲入了衝突，發動了報復性襲擊，擴大了戰場。儘管暴力不斷升級，美國總統唐納德·特朗普週二表示，軍事上的成功是如此巨大，以至於美國不再需要北約盟友的協助來完成其目標。隨著德黑蘭持續處於近乎完全的互聯網中斷之下，已故阿里·哈梅內伊的40天哀悼期已轉變為伊斯蘭共和國生存的全面防禦鬥爭時期。

timeline.title: Leaked Audio and New Tehran Airstrikes Reveal Details of Supreme Leader’s Final Moments
timeline.title_zh: 洩漏錄音與德黑蘭新空襲揭示最高領袖最後時刻細節
timeline.sub_title: New intelligence provides a definitive account of the strike that killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as ongoing Israeli operations target the regime’s remaining infrastructure and leadership assets in Tehran.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 新情報提供擊殺阿亞圖拉·阿里·哈梅內伊襲擊的確切經過，同時以色列持續行動針對德黑蘭殘餘的政權基礎設施及領導層資產。
timeline.summary:
Significant new details have emerged regarding the assassination of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, following the release of a high-level leaked audio recording and a fresh wave of precision airstrikes in the Iranian capital. The developments come more than two weeks after the February 28 strike that decapitated the Islamic Republic’s leadership, providing the most comprehensive account to date of the operation and its aftermath. Iranian state media and international observers are now grappling with the fallout as the succession of Mojtaba Khamenei is overshadowed by questions regarding his own survival and physical condition.

Leaked audio obtained by international media on March 16 features Mazaher Hosseini, the head of protocol in the late Supreme Leader’s office, providing a minute-by-minute account of the strike. According to the recording, which was verified by intelligence analysts, the leadership compound was hit by multiple missiles at 9:32 a.m. local time in a coordinated effort to eliminate the Khamenei family and top military aides simultaneously. The audio confirms that while Ali Khamenei was killed instantly, his son Mojtaba narrowly escaped death by stepping into the compound yard just moments before a missile struck his residence. The blast reportedly [ref:3, 5] killed Mojtaba’s wife, Zahra Haddad-Adel, and their son, along with high-ranking officials including Mohammad Shirazi, the head of the Supreme Leader’s military bureau.

In tandem with these revelations, the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) conducted a new series of wide-scale strikes across Tehran overnight. A primary target was the Supreme Leader’s official aircraft at Mehrabad International Airport, which was reportedly destroyed on the tarmac. Military spokespersons stated that the plane had been used by the regime’s inner circle for international coordination with proxy groups. These strikes are part of the ongoing 'Operation Roaring Lion,' which has reportedly neutralized over 85% of Iran’s air defense capabilities and a significant portion of its missile launch infrastructure since the conflict began.

Leadership uncertainty continues to paralyze the Iranian government. While Mojtaba Khamenei was formally named Supreme Leader on March 8, he has not made a public appearance, fueling intense speculation. During a press briefing on March 16, U.S. President Donald Trump suggested that the new leader might be 'dead or badly disfigured,' noting that recent statements issued in Mojtaba’s name have been read by news anchors rather than delivered via video. This stands in stark contrast to claims by Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, who insisted today that the new Supreme Leader is in 'excellent health' and maintaining full control over the nation’s defense.

As the 40-day mourning period for Ali Khamenei continues, the streets of Tehran remain under heavy security. Reports of localized celebrations following the confirmation of the elder Khamenei’s death have led to a massive deployment of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps to prevent civil unrest. With the regime's command structure heavily damaged and its primary communication channels under constant threat, the international community remains on high alert for further escalations in what has become the most significant shift in Middle Eastern geopolitics in decades.
timeline.summary_zh:
在一份高級別洩漏錄音發布以及伊朗首都發生新一輪精確空襲之後，有關伊朗最高領袖阿里·哈梅內伊被暗殺的重大新細節浮出水面。這些發展發生在2月28日導致伊斯蘭共和國領導層被斬首的襲擊兩週多後，提供了迄今為止對該行動及其後果最全面的描述。伊朗媒體和國際觀察家目前正努力應對餘波，因為繼任者穆罕默德·哈梅內伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）的繼位被其自身的生存和身體狀況問題所籠罩。

國際媒體於3月16日獲取的一段洩漏錄音，內容是已故最高領袖辦公室禮賓處主管馬扎赫爾·霍塞尼（Mazaher Hosseini）對襲擊進行了逐分鐘的詳述。根據這段被情報分析師證實的錄音，領導層複合體於當地時間上午9時32分遭到多枚導彈襲擊，這次協調行動旨在同時消滅哈梅內伊家族和高級軍事顧問。錄音證實，雖然阿里·哈梅內伊當場死亡，但其子穆罕默德在導彈擊中其住所前幾刻進入了院子，險些喪命。據報導，爆炸導致穆罕默德的妻子扎赫拉·哈達德-阿德爾（Zahra Haddad-Adel）及其兒子，以及包括最高領袖軍事辦公室主任穆罕默德·希拉齊（Mohammad Shirazi）在內的高級官員死亡。[ref:3, 5]

與這些揭露同時，以色列國防軍（IDF）在夜間對德黑蘭進行了一系列新的大規模打擊。主要目標是位於梅赫拉巴德國際機場的最高領袖專機，據報導該飛機在停機坪上被摧毀。軍方發言人稱，該飛機被伊朗核心圈子用於與代理人團體進行國際協調。這些襲擊是正在進行的「咆哮之獅行動」的一部分，據報導，自衝突開始以來，該行動已摧毀了伊朗超過85%的防空能力和相當一部分導彈發射基礎設施。

領導層的不確定性持續讓伊朗政府陷入癱瘓。儘管穆罕默德·哈梅內伊於3月8日被正式任命為最高領袖，但他並未公開露面，引發了強烈的猜測。在3月16日的 كنا新聞發布會上，美國總統唐納德·特朗普暗示新領導人可能「已死亡或嚴重毀容」，並指出近期以穆罕默德名義發表的聲明是由新聞主播宣讀，而非通過視頻發布。這與伊朗外交部長阿巴斯·阿拉格奇的說法形成鮮明對比，他今天堅稱新最高領袖「身體狀況極佳」，並對國家防務保持完全控制。

隨著阿里·哈梅內伊的40天哀悼期持續，德黑蘭街頭仍處於嚴密的安全警戒之下。據報導，在確認長老哈梅內伊死訊後，發生了零星的慶祝活動，導致伊斯蘭革命衛隊大規模部署以防止民眾騷亂。隨著政權的指揮結構受到嚴重破壞，其主要通信渠道持續受到威脅，國際社會對中東地緣政治數十年來最重大的轉變可能進一步升級保持高度警惕。
